entry.title: Creating a Dataset
entry.content:
Introduction

Intelligent platforms are those that are able to adapt as they are exposed to data. In fact, data is the foundation on which modern A.I breakthroughs are build. Data has to come from somewhere. For most applications, it is obtained by logging events generated when humans interact with the application. Sometimes, however, we may desire to build models with data that is already available but isn’t structured. For instance, we may wish to

web scraping

This means exactly what it sounds like – we scrape data from web pages. In this, maiden, blogpost I walk through the process of creating a structured dataset from unstructured data available in web pages. To ground my discussion, I’ll be creating a .csv file of all Oscar (Actor/Actress) nominess since 1927. We’ll use data from the IMDB.

entry.title: Hello World
entry.content:
Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.
